name: premind
description: OpenCode plugin that keeps sessions up to date with pull request changes

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/daemon/github/diff.test.ts src/daemon/persistence/store.test.ts src/daemon/watchers/integration.test.ts src/daemon/watchers/poll-scheduler.test.ts src/daemon/reminders/detail-files.test.ts src/plugin/__tests__/commands.test.ts src/plugin/__tests__/compatibility.test.ts src/plugin/__tests__/packaging.test.ts
